description: Security configuration for DWCMission - Tank data entry application

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.FieldTechnician
scopes.description: Scope for field technicians - can read tanks and create/edit volume readings

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Admin
scopes.description: Scope for administrators - full access to all data

role-templates.name: FieldTechnician
role-templates.description: Role for field technicians who enter tank volume readings

role-templates.name: Admin
role-templates.description: Role for administrators with full access
